title: oberonia benguetensis
intro: Oberonia benguetensis, also known as Benguet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oberonia benguetensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Oberonia benguetensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
